splash.subtitle: Turn your phone into a smart health companion.
splash.cardQuote: "Noticed a funny tingling in my feet again today."

userType.title: Select user type
userType.subtitle: Profiles for independent & dependent elderly people
userType.neoCareDesc: For family members assisting their elderly relatives
userType.neoSeniorDesc: Senior citizens capable of keeping their own personal records

auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up with your phone number to get started as a neocare.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in and continue from where you left off.
auth.neoSeniorSignUpSubtitle: Sign up with your phone number to get started as a neosenior.

neoCareOnboarding.step1Subtitle: As a neocare your account is the admin that monitors the neosenior's account
neoCareOnboarding.liveWithElderly: Do you live with the Elderly person?
neoCareOnboarding.liveWithElderlyPlaceholder: No i come assist and leave
neoCareOnboarding.step2Title: Create the Profile For the elderly
neoCareOnboarding.step2Subtitle: We thank you for caring for the elderly, currently would need to know a bit more about them
neoCareOnboarding.commentsPlaceholder: Outside the hypertension there is also issues of diabetes and periodic episodes of forgetfulness.
neoCareOnboarding.tapToRecord: Tap to record your general comments
neoCareOnboarding.step3Subtitle: Use the pairing code which is also the user ID below to setup & start monitoring.
neoCareOnboarding.step3SubtitleAlt: Save this code you can also find it in your profile. Share it with your loved ones so they can stay updated

neoSeniorOnboarding.step2Title: Thank you for prioritising your own well being
neoSeniorOnboarding.step2Subtitle: Let us get to know who you are, just a few details like your name and others
